title: Papa + Sara + Eva jump from behind couch yelling surprise
prompt: Wide shot in cozy anniversary living room with twinkling fairy lights, beige sectional couch in foreground, heart-shaped balloons, warm lamp glow. @Papa CENTER pops up from behind the couch with arms wide open. @Sara LEFT pops up from behind the couch with arms wide. @Eva RIGHT pops up from behind the couch with arms wide. All three with huge joyful smiles, eyes WIDE. Whole household together (joyful): "SURPRISE! HAPPY ANNIVERSARY!"
